claim: No Stable, release, conformance, manual assistive-technology, virtualization, package-parity, or publication claim is made by this source contract.

semantics.nativeBasis: diff-viewer: div role=region; diff-copy: button; diff-line: tr; diff-marker: th
semantics.rolePolicy: A labelled region contains a native table. Every change has a visible symbol, spoken kind, line numbers, and text; one row is in the tab order and vertical/Home/End/Page keys navigate rows.

keyboard.behavior: Enters or leaves the active diff row and ordinary toolbar controls.
Moves roving focus to the previous or next visible diff row.
Moves to the first or last diff row.
Moves by ten rows without intercepting keys outside a focused row.

nonColor: Added, removed, changed, and context lines use visible +, −, ~, and blank markers plus spoken labels and programmatic row names; color is supplemental.
responsive: Logical properties, intrinsic minimums, wrapping, and component-owned overflow preserve content at 320 CSS pixels, 200% text, and 400% reflow; evidence remains unrecorded.
consumerResponsibilities: Preserve native elements, owned roles, labels, relationships, state attributes, and DOM reading order when composing or styling this item.
Localize visible and spoken strings and retest long values, bidirectional content, focus, text spacing, zoom, and forced colors after overrides.
Large inputs use bounded native scrolling and caller-controlled chunking; virtualization is not implemented or claimed and remains a measured promotion decision.
